source_document: California SB 11 - AI Digital Replica / Right of Publicity Act
annotation_provenance: Phase 4 stress fixture, QA-8 duplicate-definition regression guard (docs/qa8_qa9_phased_plan.md). Passage text copied verbatim from the LAST (representative) of SB 11's two parallel restatements of Civil Code Section 3344 (contingent on SB 683) in output/law_texts/US-CA-SB11.txt. This exact sentence is restated identically in BOTH versions; without QA-8 collapse it would surface as two identical definition extractions from one law. Verified against src/core/restatement_scope.assess_extraction_scope: evidence text resolves in_scope=True, subdivision='(f)', reason='keyword:digital replica'.
passage_text: For the purposes of this section, a voice or likeness includes a digital replica, as defined in Section 3344.1.

definition.definition_text: a voice or likeness includes a digital replica, as defined in Section 3344.1

evidence_spans.text: a voice or likeness includes a digital replica, as defined in Section 3344.1

definition.notes: 'Digital replica' is fully defined in Civil Code Section 3344.1, which SB 11 does not restate — this sentence only extends 'voice or likeness' to cover it by cross-reference, so definition_text is the incorporation-by-reference language actually present in this passage, not 3344.1's substantive definition. QA-4's cross-passage definition dedupe is a separate, complementary mechanism (same term extracted from genuinely different sections); QA-8 is what prevents this specific sentence from being extracted twice from the SAME section's two enactment-contingency copies.
